varieties.name: Blackjack
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, bush variety; Dark green, almost black glossy fruits, cylindrical, straight shape, 15-20cm (6-8 inches) optimal harvest size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm white flesh, mild flavor, excellent texture
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity, continuous production over long season, 6-10 lbs per plant

varieties.name: Black Beauty
varieties.origin: United States, introduced in 1920s (W. Atlee Burpee)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Deep green to black glossy skin, cylindrical straight fruits, 18-20cm (7-8 inches) harvest size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender white flesh, rich mild flavor, firm texture
varieties.yield_notes: Very high, reliable continuous production, traditional standard variety
varieties.availability: Wildrose Heritage Seeds, Succeed Heirlooms, Burke's Backyard recommendations, widely available Australia

varieties.name: Golden (Golden Zucchini)
varieties.origin: United States, introduced 1973 by W. Atlee Burpee (bred from varieties by Dr. Oved Shifress)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, bush type; Bright yellow to golden skin, cylindrical straight shape, harvest at 15-20cm (6-8 inches)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm white flesh, nutty mild flavor, crisp texture, slightly sweeter than green varieties
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific, continuous heavy production, open upright habit for easy harvest

varieties.name: Tromboncino (Zucchetta Rampicante)
varieties.origin: Liguria region, northwest Italy (coastal Italian heirloom)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, vining/climbing (Cucurbita moschata species); Long curved trumpet/trombone shape, light green with pale stripes, can grow 60-90cm (2-3 feet), harvest at 30cm (1 foot) for summer squash
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender green interior when young, sweet nutty flavor, dense firm texture, excellent quality
varieties.yield_notes: Very high, prolific, dual-purpose (summer or winter squash), vigorous vines

varieties.name: Cocozelle (Cocozelle di Napoli)
varieties.origin: Italy, available since 1885, traditional Italian heirloom
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush (slight vining); Dark green with light green stripes/flecks, slight ribs, 20-25cm (8-10 inches) harvest, can harvest up to 30cm (12 inches) still tender
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very tender, slightly nutty flavor, delicious texture, excellent raw or cooked
varieties.yield_notes: Good to high, continuous production, bushier habit than standard varieties
varieties.availability: Wildrose Heritage Seeds Canada (ships internationally), Lawn.com.au mentions, various international heirloom suppliers

varieties.name: Costata Romanesco (Italian Ribbed)
varieties.origin: Rome region, Italy, traditional Italian heirloom
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, semi-vining large plants; Medium grey-green with pale green flecks, distinctive prominent ribs creating star-shaped slices, 15-20cm (6-8 inches) harvest
varieties.flesh_fruit: Nutty flavored, delicious raw or cooked, clearly better texture than hybrids, dense firm flesh
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate (half of hybrids), but superior flavor compensates, good producer of edible male blossoms

varieties.name: Ronde de Nice
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Round dark green fruits with light striping, globe/ball shaped, harvest at 8cm (3-4 inches) diameter, perfect for stuffing
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very tender with exceptional flavor, nutty sweet taste
varieties.yield_notes: Vigorous, prolific, quick flower-to-fruit (1 week), continuous until frost
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection Australia, Succeed Heirlooms Australia, international suppliers

varieties.name: Lebanese (Lebanese White Bush, Kousa)
varieties.origin: Lebanon/Middle East, developed around 19th century, traditional heirloom
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Short stocky pale green to white with grey tinge, cylindrical tapered, 10-15cm (4-6 inches), bulbous/eggplant-like shape
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet firm creamy white flesh, nutty flavor, superior taste, one of better varieties for eating raw

varieties.name: Yellow Crookneck (Early Summer Crookneck)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, bush type; Warted light yellow curved neck shape, bulbous base, harvest at 15cm (6 inches)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Creamy white flesh, excellent buttery flavor, firm texture
varieties.yield_notes: Good early production, holds and ships well

varieties.name: Desert
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid, compact bush; Dark green almost black with faint light speckling, very uniform straight cylindrical fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: High quality, excellent flavor
varieties.growing_notes: Powdery Mildew (PM), Watermelon Mosaic Virus (WMV), Zucchini Yellow Mosaic Virus (ZYMV), Cucumber Mosaic Virus (CMV), Papaya Ringspot Virus

varieties.name: Dunja
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid (organic available), compact bush; Dark green straight uniform fruits, open plant habit, small spines
varieties.flesh_fruit: Excellent quality
varieties.growing_notes: Powdery Mildew (PM), Watermelon Mosaic Virus (WMV), Zucchini Yellow Mosaic Virus (ZYMV), Papaya Ringspot Virus
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, check Australian organic seed distributors

varieties.name: Golden Glory
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid, spineless yellow, bushy; Bright yellow fruits, solid green stems, blemish-free, open habit, few spines for easy harvest
varieties.flesh_fruit: Excellent quality

varieties.name: Ambassador
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, commercial variety; Cylindrical dark green fruits, early variety
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality
varieties.availability: BigHaat India, Indian seed suppliers, check tropical monsoon climates agricultural stores

varieties.name: Gold Rush
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid; Uniform cylindrical bright golden yellow fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: Eight Ball
varieties.origin: Modern hybrid, developed late 1990s in California
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid, bush type; Round dark green globe/ball shape, harvest at 8-10cm (3-4 inches) diameter
varieties.flesh_fruit: Buttery flavor, excellent quality

varieties.name: Costata Romanesco (Italian Ribbed)
varieties.origin: Rome region, Italy, traditional Italian heirloom
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Grey-green with pale green flecks, distinctive ribs, nutty flavored
varieties.flesh_fruit: Great tasting, nutty flavor, dense texture

varieties.name: French White
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, compact bush; White to pale cream fruits, small bushes
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: Tromboncino (Zucchetta Rampicante)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, vining (Cucurbita moschata species); Long curved fruits, light green, climbs vigorously
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet nutty flavor, excellent texture

varieties.name: Blackjack
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, bush; Dark green glossy fruits, cylindrical straight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm white, mild flavor
varieties.availability: International suppliers, check Indian seed companies

varieties.name: Black Beauty
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Deep green to black glossy, cylindrical
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender white, rich flavor

varieties.name: Golden (Golden Zucchini)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, bush; Bright golden yellow, cylindrical, upright open habit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm white, nutty mild flavor, slightly sweeter

varieties.name: Lebanese (Kousa, Lebanese White Bush)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Short stocky pale green to white, 10-15cm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet firm creamy white, nutty, excellent raw

varieties.name: Cocozelle (Cocozelle di Napoli)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush with slight vining; Dark green with light green stripes, ribbed, 20-30cm harvest
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very tender, slightly nutty, excellent texture
varieties.availability: International heirloom suppliers, check tropical monsoon climates specialty seed stores

varieties.name: Ronde de Nice
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated, compact bush; Round dark green with striping, 8cm diameter harvest
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very tender, exceptional nutty sweet flavor
varieties.availability: International heirloom suppliers, check tropical monsoon climates specialty seed stores

varieties.name: Partenon (Parthenon)
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid, parthenocarpic (no pollination needed), compact bush; Medium green, uniform fruits, short spines
varieties.flesh_fruit: Excellent quality
varieties.growing_notes: Powdery Mildew, Cucumber Beetles, drought tolerant

varieties.name: Dunja
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid (organic available), compact bush; Dark green straight, open habit, small spines
varieties.flesh_fruit: Excellent quality
varieties.growing_notes: Powdery Mildew (PM), Watermelon Mosaic Virus (WMV), Zucchini Yellow Mosaic Virus (ZYMV), Papaya Ringspot Virus
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, check Indian organic/hybrid seed distributors

varieties.name: Desert
varieties.traits: F1 Hybrid, compact bush; Dark green almost black, very uniform straight
varieties.flesh_fruit: High quality, excellent
varieties.growing_notes: Powdery Mildew (PM), WMV, ZYMV, CMV, Papaya Ringspot Virus
